Design Preview

Teleport OS — Vendor

Same design system, different interaction posture. Vendor-scoped, read-heavy, action-focused.

Screen 1 / 3
My Jobs (Job List)
The vendor's primary view. Same flat table pattern as admin Jobs page, but no vendor column (you ARE the vendor), no Group By toggle. Status pills + service pills for filtering.
Teleport OS Vendor

08:00		 Pending CNY 2,800

10:30		 In Progress CNY 3,450

14:00		 Completed CNY 4,100

09:00		 Verified CNY 2,650
DO-2603-008 Temu EC Futian Depot, Shenzhen → SZX Cargo Terminal 29 Mar
11:00		 In Progress CNY 1,900
Screen 2 / 3
Job Detail (Full Page)
Full-page detail instead of slide-out. More room for fee reconciliation table, proof uploads, and activity log. Status Action Bar at top drives the vendor's next action.
← My Jobs
J01 Export Customs Clearance ECExport Customs
DO-2603-001 · TikTok Global · MAWB 160-12345678
In Progress Upload proof of service to mark this job complete

Origin
Baoan WH, Shenzhen

→

29 Mar 2026 · 16:00

Bags
24
Weight
1,280 kg

Fee Breakdown
Fee Unit Rate Qty Amount
Export Declaration Fee per shipment CNY 800 1 CNY 800
Inspection & Quarantine per shipment CNY 450 1 CNY 450
Document Handling per shipment CNY 200 1 CNY 200
X-Ray Screening per bag CNY 15 24 CNY 360
Overtime Surcharge per shipment CNY 300 1 CNY 300
Hazmat Handling per shipment CNY 500 1 CNY 500
Total (active fees) CNY 2,110
Struck-through fees have been removed by Teleport and will not appear on the settlement.

Screen 3 / 3
Status Action Bar — All 5 States
Same 5-color system as admin. The bar adapts per lifecycle stage, showing the vendor what to do next (or that there's nothing to do).
Pending Start this job when you begin work
In Progress Upload proof of service to mark complete
Completed Waiting for Teleport verification
Completed 29 Mar 15:30
Verified Verified by Teleport — ready for billing
✓ Verified 29 Mar 17:00
Cancelled Cancelled by Teleport — "Customer rescheduled pickup to next week"
Comparison
Teleport OS Admin vs Vendor — Same System, Different Posture
Side-by-side showing how the same design tokens produce different experiences for different users.
Teleport OS Admin (4 items, all vendors)
Teleport OS Admin
Shipments Jobs Rates Master Data
Teleport OS Vendor (1 item, vendor identity)
Teleport OS Vendor
My Jobs
HaleSun Logistics
HS
Design Token Teleport OS Admin Teleport OS Vendor
Nav height40px40px (same)
Nav items4 (Shipments, Jobs, Rates, Master Data)1 (My Jobs) + vendor identity
Status colors5-color system5-color system (same)
Job detail380px slide-out panelFull page
Table density8px 12px cells8px 12px cells (same)
Vendor columnYes (30+ vendors)No (you ARE the vendor)
Fees/quantitiesEditable (until Verified)Read-only (reconciliation view)
ResponsiveDesktop only (min 1200px)768px+ (tablet-friendly)
